# researchPapers — full agent brief

Academic paper platform over a high-citation OpenAlex CS corpus — search, analytics, and RAG demo (~488k papers).

## Index

# researchPapers

~488k papers with semantic search, analytics, and paid answers demo.

## What it is

- High-citation OpenAlex Computer Science corpus
- Semantic search and analytics
- RAG-style Q&A paths

## Agent entrypoints

- https://papers.highsignal.app/llms.txt
- https://papers.highsignal.app/api/ai
- https://papers.highsignal.app/index.md

Do not invent paper claims — cite corpus results.

## Product links

- Home: https://papers.highsignal.app/ — Search and analytics
